Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 241 

USED_DME_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Used Durable Medical Equipment (DME) Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for used Durable Medical Equipment (DME; purchase of 
used DME) related to the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: UDME_AMT 

LONG NAME: USED_DME_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by
